table_heading.title: Department Management
table_heading.subtitle: Use the table and filters below to view, edit, and manage the departments available to students

not_visible.label: Unavailable Departments
not_visible.subtext: Departments currently not available for selection

add_department.title: Add New Department
add_department.description: Create a new department and define its information to make it available within the college.

delete.title: Delete Department
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this department? This action cannot be undone.

add.title: Add New Department
add.description: Create a new department and specify its details so it can be associated with a college.

view.title: View Department Details
view.description: Here you can view all the details of the department.
